overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a walk through a rain-slicked, neon-lit futuristic city. The player waits at an intersection dominated by a building with massive ventilation fans and holographic advertisements, crosses a busy street with futuristic vehicles, and proceeds along a sidewalk lined with towering glass buildings and glowing signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with holographic advertisements and ventilation structure

events.description: futuristic sports cars and sedans pass through the intersection
black van drives past from left to right across the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner observing traffic and waiting for the pedestrian signal

notable_agents.action: futuristic purple sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large industrial building with two massive circular ventilation fans and green trim
glowing advertisement display mounted above the ventilation fans showing animated content
red metal pedestrian control box with walk signal display
broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes and wet reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rain-slicked futuristic intersection dominated by a massive building with dual ventilation fans and holographic advertisements. The camera stands stationary at the corner as various futuristic vehicles pass by, including a purple sedan and a black van. Neon signs glow in the distance against the dusk sky, and the wet asphalt reflects the vibrant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk with yellow hazard stripes

events.description: pedestrian signal changes to walk and ego begins crossing the street
green sports car passes in front while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk following a pedestrian in a blue hoodie

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing light blue hoodie and pink shorts walking ahead across the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall glass and steel building with illuminated windows rising on the left side of the street
towering building facade covered in neon signs and holographic advertisement panels
series of glowing rectangular advertisement screens displaying various products

segments.scene_description: The ego begins crossing the wide intersection, following a pedestrian in a blue hoodie across the yellow-striped crosswalk. The perspective shifts from facing the ventilation building to looking down the urban canyon between towering cyberpunk high-rises. Holographic advertisements glow on the right building facade as the camera moves steadily across the wet street, with a green sports car passing by in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city sidewalk with neon signage and holographic advertisements

events.description: steps onto the sidewalk and enters the urban canyon between tall buildings
passes a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella and continues straight along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians in the neon-lit city canyon

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing blue umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wet concrete pedestrian walkway with red curb markings
line of dark-colored futuristic sedans parked along the street curb
tall glowing signage with cyan and pink neon lights attached to building facades

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the ego now walks along a concrete sidewalk between towering cyberpunk buildings that form an urban canyon. The sky is mostly blocked by the high-rise structures, while neon signs and holographic billboards illuminate the scene with cyan and magenta light. The camera passes pedestrians including one with a glowing umbrella, moving steadily forward as parked futuristic cars line the right side of the street and the city extends into the misty distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that moves from a stationary vantage point at a bustling intersection into the depths of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins at a rain-slicked corner dominated by a massive building with dual ventilation fans and holographic ads, where the camera watches purple and black futuristic vehicles pass over reflective asphalt. As the perspective shifts, the camera follows a pedestrian in a blue hoodie across a yellow-striped crosswalk, transitioning from the open intersection toward the narrow gap between towering cyberpunk high-rises. The scene then expands into a walk along a concrete sidewalk, where the open dusk sky is replaced by a canopy of skyscrapers illuminated by cyan and magenta holographic billboards. Finally, the camera moves steadily past pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and rows of parked cars, heading deeper into the misty, light-filled distance of the city.
